info.title: 🏗️ ERD Pro: AI-Powered Schema Engine
info.description:
### 🌐 Overview
**ERD Pro** is a high-performance database design platform that bridges the gap between raw code and visual architecture. It empowers developers to visualize, design, and manage complex database schemas through an AI-driven interface.

#### 🚀 Core System Architecture
* **AI Schema Parser**: Powered by **Gemini 3 Flash**, the engine deconstructs C# entities and SQL DDL into structured JSON schemas with intelligent, non-overlapping visual coordinates.
* **Bidirectional Transformation**: Seamlessly transform visual diagrams back into production-ready **SQL Scripts** or **EF Core Entities**.
* **Schema Persistence**: A robust storage layer for complex ERD JSON objects, ensuring design integrity and stateless session management.
* **RESTful Integrity**: Implements standard HTTP patterns with strict ownership validation and atomic database transactions.

#### 🔑 Security & Identity
The API is secured via **JWT Bearer Authentication**. All project-related operations are sandboxed to the authenticated user's identity, ensuring that design schemas remain private and secure.

post.description:
### 🚀 Account Onboarding

This endpoint allows new users to join the ERD Pro platform. Upon successful registration, the system automatically logs the user in and generates a secure JWT session.

#### **🔒 Security Details:**
| Claim | Description | Value Example |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `nameid` | Unique System User ID | `GUID` |
| `email` | Registered Email | `user@example.com` |
| `role` | Default Access Role | `User` |

> **Note:** The password must meet security complexity: at least 8 characters, numbers, and special symbols.

post.description:
### 🔑 Secure Authentication

Exchange user credentials for a secure JWT access token. This token must be included in the `Authorization` header for all protected API calls.

#### **Session Lifecycle:**
* **Validity**: 7 Days (Default).
* **Type**: Bearer Token.

> **Security Note:** Never share your JWT token. If compromised, contact system admin immediately.

get.summary: Get all projects for the current user
get.description:
### 📂 Project Library

Retrieves a collection of all ERD projects owned by the authenticated user. This returns a summarized version of the projects for listing purposes.

#### **Security:**
* **Required Role**: Any Authenticated User.
* **Authentication**: Bearer Token required.

> **Note:** To get the full ERD content (JSON), use the `GetById` endpoint.

post.description:
### 🏗️ Start a New Design

Creates a new project record assigned to the current user. You can start with a name only, or provide a full JSON schema.

#### **Technical Details:**
* **Default Content**: If `contentJson` is null, the system initializes: `{"tables": []}`.
* **Ownership**: The project is automatically linked to your JWT Identity.

> **Success Response**: You will receive a `201 Created` status with the full project object including its generated `Id`.

put.description:
### 🔄 Refine Your Design

Modifies an existing project. You can update only the name, only the JSON schema, or both in a single request.

#### **Operational Logic:**
* **Delta Updates**: If a field is omitted or null, its existing value in the database remains unchanged.
* **Validation**: The project `Id` must exist and belong to the authenticated user.

> **Response**: Returns `204 No Content` on success, indicating the resource was updated without sending back the data.

get.description:
### 🔍 Deep Dive into Schema

Fetches all information for a specific project, including the raw `ContentJson` which holds the entire ERD structure.

#### **Data Breakdown:**
* **Metadata**: Name and Creation Date.
* **ContentJson**: A stringified object containing tables, coordinates for the UI, and database constraints.

> **Note:** This endpoint checks for ownership. If the project doesn't belong to you, it will return a `404 Not Found` for security purposes.

delete.description:
### ⚠️ Danger Zone

Deletes the specified project and all its associated data from the database. **This action is irreversible.**

#### **Validation & Security:**
* **Ownership Check**: You can only delete projects created by your account.
* **Referential Integrity**: Deleting a project will remove its ERD JSON schema and all metadata.

> **Warning:** Ensure you have a backup of the `ContentJson` if you might need the design later.

post.description:
### 🧠 Intelligent Schema Extraction

Leverages **Gemini 3 Flash** to deconstruct raw programming code or SQL scripts into a structured visual ERD format.

#### **AI Capabilities:**
* **Visual Grid Layout**: Calculates non-overlapping (X, Y) coordinates.
* **Relationship Detection**: Inferred PK/FK and M:N virtual relationships.

> **Note:** The response is optimized for direct consumption by the ERD Canvas engine.

### 📜 Code Generation Engine

This endpoint acts as the reverse-engineer of the AI engine. It takes a visual ERD JSON structure and translates it into production-ready source code.

#### **Transformation Logic:**
* **SQL Dialects**: Generates DDL including `CREATE TABLE`, `PRIMARY KEY`, and `FOREIGN KEY` constraints.
* **ORM Mapping**: Can generate C# Entity Framework classes with appropriate Data Annotations.
* **Relationship Handling**: Correctly interprets M:N virtual relationships into physical junction tables in the output script.

| Supported Languages | Output Type | Accuracy |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| SQL, PostgreSQL, C# | Plain Text (Code) | High (Architect Level) |

> **Note:** The generated code is optimized for the requested `targetLanguage` query parameter.

tags.name: 1. Identity & Security
tags.description:
### 🔐 Access Control & User Identity

This section handles the entry point of the ERD Pro platform. It is responsible for creating new accounts and authenticating existing users.

#### **Authentication Flow:**
* **Registration**: Collects user details and initializes a secure profile.
* **Token Issuance**: Both login and registration return a **JWT (JSON Web Token)**.
* **State Management**: Authentication is stateless; the client must store the token for subsequent requests.

| Feature | Implementation | Purpose |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Credential Storage** | Identity Password Hashing | Securely stores user passwords. |
| **Session Security** | Bearer Token Strategy | Standard JWT implementation for authorization. |

> **Tip:** Use the `Token` returned in the response to authorize requests in other sections of the API.

tags.name: 2. Projects Management
tags.description:
### 🏗️ ERD Design & Schema Engine

This module is the heart of ERD Pro. It acts as a specialized storage engine for your database designs, allowing for complex schema persistence and retrieval.

#### **💡 Key Architecture Features:**
* **JSON Schema Storage**: Highly optimized handling of large stringified JSON objects representing tables and relations.
* **Stateless Management**: Each project is securely sandboxed to the authenticated user via JWT Claims.
* **Atomic Synchronization**: Ensures that project metadata (Name) and visual data (ContentJson) are updated in a single database transaction.

#### **📊 Operational Logic:**
| Operation | Data Strategy | Format |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Listing** | Summarized Metadata (No JSON) | JSON Summary |
| **Detailed View** | Full Schema Extraction | Deep JSON Object |
| **Persistence** | UPSERT (Update or Insert) | Raw JSON String |

> **Pro Tip:** When loading a project into the canvas, use the `GetById` endpoint to fetch the full `ContentJson` and parse it on the client side.

tags.name: 3. AI Schema Engine
tags.description:
### 🤖 AI-Powered Architect (Gemini 3 Flash)

The intelligence layer of ERD Pro that bridges the gap between raw code and visual database design.

#### **Capabilities:**
* **Code to ERD**: Transforms C# Classes or SQL DDL into structured JSON schemas.
* **ERD to Code**: Reverse-engineers visual designs back into production-ready scripts.
* **Intelligent Layout**: AI-calculated positioning to prevent table overlapping on the canvas.

| Input Type | Model | Output |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Raw Code / SQL | Gemini 3 Flash | Visual JSON Schema |

🔒 **Performance**: Real-time structural analysis with low-latency response.
